display_name: BGP learned route installation to ASIC
trigger: BGP session receives UPDATE with new prefix

steps.action: Receives BGP UPDATE message, runs best-path selection algorithm, installs winning route into FRR RIB
steps.output: Route entry in FRR's BGP RIB and selected as best path
steps.verify: docker exec bgp vtysh -c 'show bgp ipv4 unicast <prefix>'

steps.action: Receives route from bgpd via internal ZAPI, installs into zebra RIB, programs Linux kernel via netlink, and sends FPM message to fpmsyncd
steps.output: Route in Linux kernel routing table and FPM message queued

steps.action: Receives FPM netlink message from zebra via TCP socket (port 2620), parses RTM_NEWROUTE, writes route to APPL_DB ROUTE_TABLE
Notified of APPL_DB ROUTE_TABLE change via ConsumerStateTable, resolves next-hop to SAI neighbor/next-hop-group objects, calls sai_route_api->create_route_entry()
Receives SAI Redis notification from ASIC_DB, calls vendor SAI library sai_route_api->create_route_entry() which programs the ASIC TCAM/FIB
steps.output: Route programmed in hardware forwarding table
steps.verify: show ip route <prefix> (should show in hardware table)

failure_injection_points.failure: zebra not receiving route from bgpd
failure_injection_points.symptom: Route visible in 'show bgp' but not in 'show ip route' or Linux kernel
failure_injection_points.diagnosis: Check zebra status: docker exec bgp supervisorctl status zebra; check /var/log/frr/zebra.log for errors

failure_injection_points.symptom: Route in Linux kernel 'ip route show' but not in APPL_DB (redis-cli -n 0 KEYS 'ROUTE_TABLE:*')
failure_injection_points.diagnosis: Check fpmsyncd: docker exec bgp supervisorctl status fpmsyncd; check /var/log/swss/fpmsyncd.log; verify FPM socket connection: ss -tlnp | grep 2620

failure_injection_points.symptom: Route in APPL_DB ROUTE_TABLE but not in ASIC_DB; 'show ip route' may show route but traffic not forwarding
failure_injection_points.diagnosis: Check orchagent: docker exec swss supervisorctl status orchagent; check /var/log/swss/orchagent.log for SAI errors; check if next-hop is resolved in NEIGH_TABLE

failure_injection_points.symptom: Route in ASIC_DB but syncd reports SAI_STATUS_FAILURE; route not in hardware forwarding table
failure_injection_points.diagnosis: Check syncd: docker exec syncd supervisorctl status syncd; check /var/log/syncd.log for SAI error codes; check if ASIC memory (TCAM/FIB) is full
